title: Pearl 63
description:
The Pearl 63 is a sleek British flybridge motor yacht spanning 18.61 metres, designed by Dixon Yacht Design with a Kelly Hoppen interior and powered by twin Volvo Penta IPS pod drives for joystick-controlled handling up to 33 knots with a range of 260 nautical miles.

She accommodates up to 8 guests across 4 double cabins, featuring a full-beam midships master suite with private entrance, aft cockpit fold-down balconies, a Seakeeper gyro stabiliser, and a hard top with sunroof. CE Category B certified and equipped to the highest standard.

Contact Yacht Research for full specifications, survey and a private viewing.
